curation_notes: Patch commit 5ceb17630b identified from v7.0.0 release via git log --grep. 2 non-test source files changed: backup_config_utils.go (adds nil guard for backup.Container before accessing .Devices and .ExpandedDevices in UpdateInstanceConfig) and api_internal.go (adds nil guard for backupConf.Container before accessing .Name in internalImportFromBackup). No sibling files in internal/server/backup/ contain the same unguarded .Container dereference pattern. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed from CWE-476 and the patch clearly adding nil pointer checks.
